title: Anchor User Journeys
summary: Thirteen end-to-end Anchor user journeys (onboarding, Telegram/Google pairing, daily check-ins, memory recall/correction/deletion, Pro billing, trusted-contact recovery) with triggers, steps, and acceptance criteria.
scope: Stripe Pro subscription (upgrade, manage, cancel, failed renewal)
notes: Path docs/requirements/ plus pervasive user-journey structure (UJ-001..UJ-013 with Trigger/Preconditions/Steps/Data created/Acceptance criteria) are strong PRD signals. References WUX-017 banner ID and account routes (/account/plan) are inline identifiers, not document links, so cross_refs is empty. No frontmatter or H1-type field; classified by content. Filename suffix is a stable per-source slug suffix (no sibling collision since 'user-journeys' is unique in tree).
